title: midnight craving australian christmas pudding fritters
description: deep-fried christmas pudding bites perfect for midnight cravings, low in carbs and rich in flavor
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 180°C.
In a bowl, mix together the eggs, flour, grated coconut, unsalted butter, vanilla extract, confectioners sugar, and salt.
Add the crumbled christmas pudding to the bowl and mix until a thick batter forms.
Using a spoon, drop the batter into the hot oil, making sure not to overcrowd the pan.
Fry the fritters for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the fritters from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Drizzle the honey over the fritters and serve immediately.
Repeat the process with the remaining batter, adjusting the heat as needed.
If the oil temperature drops, the fritters may absorb more oil and become greasy.
Serve the fritters warm, dust with confectioners sugar if desired.
